---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem with Heimdall
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: gpadidala
---

## 🐛 Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## ✅ Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## 🔁 Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Run test category '...'
4. See error

## 🧾 Logs / error messages

```
Paste the backend log from `heimdall.log` or the browser console here.
```

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 🖥️ Environment

- **Heimdall version:** (e.g. v2.2.0)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node -v`)
- **Grafana version:** (e.g. 11.4.0)
- **Grafana edition:** OSS / Enterprise / Cloud
- **OS:** macOS / Linux / Windows
- **Browser:** Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge
- **Deployment:** Docker / Manual / Other

## 🔗 Test category

Which category produced the failure? (e.g. `dashboards`, `datasources`, `alerts`, or `all`)

## 💬 Additional context

Any other context about the problem — recent upgrades, proxy setup, custom config, etc.
